response:
* **[Villain Moment – Start with Zombo’s dramatic entrance]**  
Zombo, the ghostly clown, floats ominously above a pile of discarded cotton candy, wearing a clown wig that’s clearly from a Halloween store and a costume that’s half a decade out of style. He yells, “I’M ZOMBO, AND I’M HERE TO SCARE THE LIVING DAYLIGHT OUT OF YOU ALL!” before launching a giant rubber chicken at Shaggy, who gets knocked into a hot dog stand. The chicken bounces off a sign that reads “Welcome to Jipner’s Joyland – Now Closed Per Order of the Devil.” Shaggy screams, “Why is the devil involved?!” while Scooby just stares at the chicken like it’s a new flavor of Scooby Snacks.

* **[The Gang Arrives and Immediately Question Everything]**  
The gang arrives at Jipner’s Joyland, which is a dilapidated park with a Ferris wheel that looks like it was built by a group of angry squirrels. Daphne says, “This place is more of a ‘Jipner’s Joyland’ than a real amusement park. It’s like if a haunted house had a bad day.” Fred looks at a sign that says “Welcome to Jipner’s Joyland – Now Closed Per Order of the Devil” and says, “Hey, that’s a really cool sign. Who designed it? It’s got a great *source* of mystery!” Velma facepalms and says, “Fred, that sign is literally just a sign. It doesn’t make sense. Also, why is the devil involved?!”

* **[Fred Mistakes a Character for a Celebrity]**  
They meet Jolly Jipner, who’s in a turnip costume and crying. Fred immediately says, “Hey, are you related to *Jolly* J. R. R. Tolkien?!” Jolly screams, “I’M NOT RELATED TO TOLKIEN, I’M A TURNIP!” and runs off. Fred shrugs and says, “Well, I thought he was a Tolkien. I’m not wrong. I’m just *famous*.” Velma says, “Fred, that’s not even a real person. You just made that up.” Fred says, “No, I didn’t. I saw a documentary.”

* **[Red Herring Gets Blamed Again, Gets Into a Funny Situation]**
